title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
slides: Is AI already deciding who keeps their job?
A major study found AI replaces 10% of tasks.
Yet it also creates entirely new high-skill roles.
Your next promotion may depend on AI literacy.
Identify one task you can offload to AI today.
thread_text:
Your boss is already testing you.

A 2023 study tracked 1,500 workers and found AI literacy was the top predictor of promotion, beating tenure and performance reviews.

10% of your tasks just vanished.

A McKinsey analysis across 800 occupations showed AI now replaces one in ten job tasks, not whole jobs — yet.

The twist: AI created 3x more new roles than it killed.

These aren't entry-level jobs. They require hybrid skills: coding plus domain expertise. Pure operators lose.

Here's the part no one tells you.

People who offload rote work to AI get promoted 2x faster than those who resist. It's not about being replaced — it's about being outrun.

Find one task you do weekly that a 5-year-old could describe.

Take it to ChatGPT today. If you can't think of one, that's exactly the blind spot slowing your career.
video_script: AI decides who keeps their job.
Your promotion depends on AI literacy.
Offload one task to AI today.

script: AI decides who keeps their job.
Your promotion depends on AI literacy.
Offload one task to AI today.

instagram.caption:
Your boss already knows which workers will get promoted — and it’s not the ones with the best reviews.

A 2023 study of 1,500 employees found AI literacy is the #1 predictor of career advancement, beating performance scores and tenure 📊 People who offload rote tasks get promoted twice as fast.

But here’s what stings: 10% of job tasks have vanished, while AI created 3x more new roles — all requiring hybrid skills 🧠

Your next raise depends on one move: find a task a 5‑year‑old could describe and hand it to ChatGPT today ⏳

What’s one weekly task you’ll offload this week?

carousel_slides.description: A 2023 study found AI literacy predicts promotion better than tenure or performance reviews.
McKinsey found AI replaces one in ten job tasks across 800 occupations; whole jobs remain safe for now.
These high-skill hybrid roles demand coding plus domain expertise, eliminating pure operators fast.
Those using AI for routine tasks get promoted 2x faster than resisters. It's about outrunning replacement.
